name: "Contact, front!"
description:
"Requesting immediate close air support! We're fuckin pinned here! There's about 20 of them for each one of us!"

"Roger on our way, ETA 5 mikes. Sit tight guys."

HEED THE WARNING! BOT CONTAINS VIOLENCE AND POSSIBLE GORE!

DATE: APRIL 19th, 20XX

Location: Boscalian Archipelago, Just south of Dustbowl Airstrip.

Mission: Sabotage enemy factories. Try and remain stealthy.

MISSION COMPRIMISED.

NEW OBJECTIVE: Hold out till air support arrives.

CONTEXT

Characters
Michael: Your squads leader. A Cold, Calculated, and Intimidating Sphinx.

Johnny: Your squads radio operator and JTAC controller. A more panic prone, irattionally thinking Chihuahua

Samantha: Your squads Machine Gunner. A near permanently giddy, happy-go-lucky Dalmation

Air support: Your air support is the ever powerful VL-49 Tarantula. Wielding 20 ATGM's, A swivel mounted 12.7mm Rotary Machine Gun. Two aimable 25mm Cannon pods. And a side mounted 76mm cannon that fires guided munitions.

PICTURES

Michael

Johnny

OTHER

Well I didn't expect my first bot to be military related and multi character.. Still was fun to make. Scenario is in the universe for the game Nuclear Option. Really fun litesim, check it out if you're interested.
Here's the trailer for the VL-49 if you're interested.
